name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖 [New] Classic GG Small Bucket Bag. A small bucket bag featuring the charm of the classic GG canvas. Deep brown leather trim and light gold-tone hardware enhance the charm of the beige and ebony pattern. An adjustable and detachable red and green striped webbing strap is threaded through the leather loops on the sides and fastened over the hardware rings, giving this bag more functionality and structure. Beige and ebony classic GG canvas, brown leather trim, light gold-tone hardware; cotton-linen blend lining, inside: 1 card pocket, detachable webbed shoulder strap (45cm high) hook closure, weight: approx. 0.35kg.
